chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO C. P. No.S-86 of 2025. Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For orders on maintainability of main case. 25.08.2025 Mr. Mehtab Hussain Soomro, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Asstt. A. G. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P. G. ASI Khanan Khan Buriro of PS Garhi Hassan, District Jacobabad is present. -.-.-.-.-.- Statement filed on behalf of official respondents No.1, taken on record, copy of same has been provided to learned counsel for the petitioner. Official respondent has stated in his statement that they had never harassed the petitioner and his family members nor they intend to do so in future. Learned Asstt. A. G Sindh and learned Addl. P. G submitted that official respondents are legally bound to provide legal protection to all the citizens including the petitioner without any discrimination. They after going through the record, ensure that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection of life, honour and property to the petitioner and his family in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. Learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied with the statement made by learned Asstt. A. G and learned Addl. P. G sought disposal of instant petition with direction to the official respondents to provide necessary protection to the petitioner in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. In view of whatever discussed above, instant petition stands disposed of with directions to official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide necessary legal protection of life, liberty, honour and property to the petitioner and his family members in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment.

G sought disposal of instant petition with direction to the official respondents to provide necessary protection to the petitioner in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. In view of whatever discussed above, instant petition stands disposed of with directions to official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide necessary legal protection of life, liberty, honour and property to the petitioner and his family members in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. Let copy of this order be provided to learned Asstt. A. G, learned Addl. P. G and copy of the same shall also be communicated to SSP Jacobabad over fax for compliance. Judge M.Yousuf Panhwar/**
